{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323015550344652C026AB528D06E8"}"},"total":728},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7519678145514963737","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"不错的爽文，推演很好看，但现实的剧情让我梦回古早龙傲天。","text_exts":[{"e":27,"s":24,"text":"龙傲天","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E9%BE%99%E5%82%B2%E5%A4%A9&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774202150528D06E8%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227519678145514963737%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227330252288952388670%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%BE%99%E5%82%B2%E5%A4%A9%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1750820272,"group_id":"7330252288952388670","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7IUz/i0YJ4LWpo9bXV9jsQtTlsy5ZstlIadEgF3O47J","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/7acb4c8d0a5544e7bffbaab0dff590f3~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795249&x-signature=pOO9uIGSQLqdysyA33XFZIh5E3o%3D","user_id":"3930083100466835","user_name":"丘比的江之岛盾子"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3930083100466835","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7330252288952388670","book_info":{"abstract":"【打造世界+双系统+幕后文+无女主】
　　方影穿越成为一个人人皆可成神的世界，每个人都有打造独属世界的机会。
　　有人开辟高武世界，成为一界武祖。
　　有人建立修仙世界，成为万古仙帝。
　　也有人因为世界破碎，就此陨落，化作虚无。
　　方影穿越归来，手持【推演系统】，开启克苏鲁文明。
　　青铜技能：神秘异化，令生物发生未知的神奇改变。
　　白银技能：思慧增殖，可以无差别的令万物具备自我意识。
　　黄金技能：跨越融合，可以人为操控将不同种类的生物进行融合。
　　王者技能：万物抽取，可以在时间长河中抽取不可知的存在，任尔御使。
　　某一刻，在他人还小心翼翼，经营世界之时，方影带着盲目痴愚之神阿撒托斯，万物归一者犹格索托斯，黑山羊之母纱布尼古拉斯，横推外界，征服众生！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b44a7f5376b814602542498a1f43ca3c","author":"暗黑小萝莉S","author_id":"","book_id":"7330252288952388670","book_name":"推演万物：我塑造了克苏鲁世界","book_short_name":"诡魇之书","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202020","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6425人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":705,"name":"克苏鲁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=705&name=克苏鲁&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":866,"name":"双系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=866&name=双系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7330252316412478014","read_count":"6425","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"939321"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.0","serial_count":"433","tags":"都市高武,都市,系统,穿越,无女主,开局,克苏鲁,无后宫,双系统","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/1cdb80689fdfb2961dd20bef888c9b3b~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779386150&x-signature=9qTZ 　　方影穿越归来，手持【推演系统】，开启克苏鲁文明。
